title: Beautiful grain and finish
body: The craftsmanship is outstanding and the table feels heirloom-quality.

title: Perfect centerpiece
body: The pedestal base is sculptural and incredibly stable.

title: Comfortable and refined
body: The chair arrived exactly as pictured and feels luxurious.

title: Great loft piece
body: Love the steel base and reclaimed top pairing.

title: Looks even better in person
body: The travertine top has beautiful variation and the console is solid.

title: Excellent storage
body: The sideboard hides a lot and the fluted doors are gorgeous.

title: Craft quality is obvious
body: Lightweight but sturdy, with a great woven seat.

title: Ideal compact desk
body: Perfect for my apartment office and the walnut tone is rich.

title: An incredible table
body: This is one of the best custom-size dining tables we considered.
